assertions.description: Crystal circuit (Y1, 16MHz, C2/C4 22pF load caps) correctly detected with 14pF effective load. USB D- RC filter (R7 22R + C3 1uF, 7.23kHz) and reset RC filter (R1 10k + C1 100nF, 159Hz) correctly identified. Decoupling analysis shows 5 caps on +5V rail (10.4uF total). Key matrix 10x11 with 95 keys on matrix detected.
